ocr.text: In the Asia-Pacific oil and gas sector, production volume by basin and drilling rig count trends are critical indicators of market
dynamics and operational efficiency. Recent analysis highlights the Cooper Basin, which has demonstrated a remarkable year-
on-year change in production of 150%, signaling robust growth and increased activity in this area. This uptick is further
underscored by the basin's market share, which stands at 7%, indicating its significance within the regional landscape.
Exploration efforts, particularly in the Browse Basin, have also been noteworthy, with a market share of 2% and a focus on new
drilling initiatives—reflected in the notes that emphasize ongoing exploration activities.

production increases, as companies aim to capitalize on emerging opportunities.
